'''Nell Voorson''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who was the wife of [[Johan Voorson]], the mother of [[Shannon Voorson]] and the aunt of [[Deen Voorson]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Dragon" /> In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of "[[Slaying Dragons]]" to [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].</ref> she had been promoted to Senior Docking Officer for [[Kuat Freight Port]]. When her nephew Deen arrived home and asked her to allow him and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to steal a [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]], she refused. In her stead, Shannon put together the theft of the power generator and defected to the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="Dragon" />
